posts.author: sa07chin (Sachin Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Struggling to manage hardware, software, or any other critical assets across teams?
The Asset Management app on monday.com gives you a centralized system to track, monitor, and control your physical and digital assets—all within your monday workspace.

Top Features:

  • Track lifecycle stages (procured, assigned, in-repair, retired)
  • Assign assets to users or departments
  • Get real-time visibility into asset usage and availability
  • Set alerts for warranty expiry, renewal, or scheduled maintenance

Perfect For:

  • IT and Admin teams managing laptops, servers, licenses
  • Facilities and operations teams tracking equipment
  • Startups and enterprises that want to eliminate spreadsheet chaos

Why It Matters:
This app helps prevent asset loss, ensures accountability, and saves time on audits and procurement planning.

Explore the Asset Management app on monday.com
